stemHtml: Which of the following can be stored as up to five letter waypoint identifiers through the CDU of a B737-400 Flight Management System?

options.a: Airway names; navaid identifiers; airport names; waypoint code numbers.
options.b: Waypoint names; navaid frequencies; runway codes; airport ICAO identifiers.
options.c: Waypoint names; navaid positions; airport ICAO identifiers; airport names.
options.d: Waypoint names; navaid identifiers; runway numbers; airport ICAO identifiers.
